rationale: Educ. Code §7.029 governs information exchange between TEA and DFPS regarding foster care students. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 7.029. MEMORANDUM OF UNDERSTANDING REGARDING EXCHANGE OF INFORMATION FOR STUDENTS IN FOSTER CARE.
_note: No relationship between the cited rule and the proposed change; rule concerns foster care student data sharing, not property tax exemptions.
